title: Iga Swiatek Changes Coaches After Tough Tennis Loss
summary: Iga Swiatek is a famous tennis player who just stopped working with her coach, Wim Fissette. They started together in October 2024 and won big tournaments like Wimbledon, Seoul, and Cincinnati. But this year, Iga has not played as well, losing early in four tournaments, including the Miami Open where she lost to Magda Linette. This was her first early loss in 74 tournaments. Iga said she feels disappointed and has learned lessons. She decided to take a new path without her coach. She thanked him for helping her believe in herself and improve her game. Iga plays best when she feels clear and confident on the court.

background_read: Iga Swiatek is a top tennis player from Poland who has won six major tournaments. Coaches help athletes improve by giving advice and training. Tennis tournaments are events where players compete to win titles. Sometimes players change coaches to try new strategies or after tough losses.

WHAT: They stopped working together after Iga lost early in tournaments
